description: Invalid EXTRACT function: typo in date part
fixed_query:
SELECT
  name,
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) AS year_created
FROM brex_data.account
broken_query:
SELECT
  name,
  EXTRACT(YEER FROM created_at) AS year_created
FROM brex_data.account
error_message: ERROR: unit "yeer" not recognized for type timestamp without time zone

description: Invalid type cast: wrong cast syntax
fixed_query:
SELECT name, start_time::date AS event_date
FROM calendly_data.event
WHERE start_time > '2023-01-01'
broken_query:
SELECT name, CAST start_time AS date AS event_date
FROM calendly_data.event
WHERE start_time > '2023-01-01'
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "start_time"
  Position: 137

description: Invalid window function: PARTITION BY with wrong syntax
fixed_query:
SELECT
  email,
  created_at,
  RANK() OVER (
    PARTITION BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
    ORDER BY created_at
  ) AS monthly_rank
FROM customerio_data.customer
broken_query:
SELECT
  email,
  created_at,
  RANK() OVER (
    PARTITION DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
    ORDER BY created_at
  ) AS monthly_rank
FROM customerio_data.customer
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "DATE_TRUNC"
  Position: 179

description: Invalid PostgreSQL array syntax: missing brackets
fixed_query:
SELECT name
FROM google_adwords_data.account
WHERE currency_code = ANY(ARRAY['USD', 'EUR', 'GBP'])
broken_query:
SELECT name
FROM google_adwords_data.account
WHERE currency_code = ANY(ARRAY 'USD', 'EUR', 'GBP')
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "'USD'"
  Position: 196

description: Invalid window frame specification: wrong keywords
fixed_query:
SELECT
  id,
  type,
  COUNT(*) OVER (
    PARTITION BY type
    ORDER BY id
    ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
  ) AS running_count
FROM lever_data.application
broken_query:
SELECT
  id,
  type,
  COUNT(*) OVER (
    PARTITION BY type
    ORDER BY id
    ROWS FROM UNBOUNDED PRECEDING TO CURRENT ROW
  ) AS running_count
FROM lever_data.application
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "FROM"
  Position: 205

description: Invalid string concatenation: missing concatenation operator
fixed_query: SELECT name || ' Campaign' AS full_name FROM linkedin_ads_data.campaign
broken_query: SELECT name + ' Campaign' AS full_name FROM linkedin_ads_data.campaign
error_message:
ERROR: operator does not exist: character varying + unknown
  Hint: No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.
  Position: 131

fixed_query:
SELECT c.email, gs.month_num
FROM quickbooks_data.customer c
CROSS JOIN GENERATE_SERIES(1, 12) AS gs(month_num)
broken_query:
SELECT c.email, gs.month_num
FROM quickbooks_data.customer c
CROSS JOIN GENERATE_SERIES 1, 12 AS gs(month_num)
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "1"
  Position: 207

description: Invalid window function: LAG with wrong parameter count
fixed_query:
SELECT
  name,
  created_date,
  LAG(created_date, 1) OVER (ORDER BY created_date) AS prev_date
FROM salesforce_data.account
broken_query:
SELECT
  name,
  created_date,
  LAG(created_date, 1, 0, 'default') OVER (ORDER BY created_date) AS prev_date
FROM salesforce_data.account
error_message:
ERROR: function lag(timestamp without time zone, integer, integer, unknown) does not exist
  Hint: No function matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.
  Position: 152

description: Invalid REGEXP_REPLACE function: missing flags parameter delimiter
fixed_query:
SELECT
  title,
  REGEXP_REPLACE(title, '[^A-Za-z0-9]', '_', 'g') AS clean_title
FROM shopify_data.product
broken_query:
SELECT
  title,
  REGEXP_REPLACE(title, '[^A-Za-z0-9]', '_' 'g') AS clean_title
FROM shopify_data.product
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "'g'"
  Position: 179

fixed_query:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('week', created) AS charge_week,
  COUNT(*)
FROM stripe_data.charge
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', created)
broken_query:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC(7 * 'day', created) AS charge_week,
  COUNT(*)
FROM stripe_data.charge
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(7 * 'day', created)
error_message:
ERROR: invalid input syntax for type integer: "day"
  Position: 143

description: Invalid column alias with / in name
fixed_query:
SELECT
  annual_revenue / number_of_employees AS "revenue/employee"
FROM salesforce_data.account
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT
  annual_revenue / number_of_employees AS revenue/employee
FROM salesforce_data.account
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "/"
  Position: 175

description: Single quotes used for identifier instead of double quotes
fixed_query:
SELECT
  name,
  status,
  start_time AS "Event Start"
FROM calendly_data.event
WHERE status = 'active'
broken_query:
SELECT
  name,
  status,
  start_time AS 'Event Start'
FROM calendly_data.event
WHERE status = 'active'
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "'Event Start'"
  Position: 160

description: Double quotes used for string literal instead of single quotes
fixed_query:
SELECT email, created_at
FROM customerio_data.customer
WHERE email LIKE '%@example.com'
LIMIT 5
broken_query:
SELECT email, created_at
FROM customerio_data.customer
WHERE email LIKE "%@example.com"
LIMIT 5
error_message:
ERROR: column "%@example.com" does not exist
  Position: 191

description: Unquoted identifier with special characters that requires quoting
fixed_query:
SELECT
  name,
  annual_revenue,
  annual_revenue * 0.15 AS "tax@15%"
FROM salesforce_data.account
WHERE annual_revenue > 1000000
broken_query:
SELECT
  name,
  annual_revenue,
  annual_revenue * 0.15 AS tax@15%
FROM salesforce_data.account
WHERE annual_revenue > 1000000
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "@"
  Position: 182

description: Incorrect dollar-quoted string constant syntax: $ vs $$
fixed_query:
SELECT
  id,
  amount,
  description
FROM stripe_data.charge
WHERE description = $$Payment for order #123$$
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT
  id,
  amount,
  description
FROM stripe_data.charge
WHERE description = $Payment for order #123$
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "$"
  Position: 200

description: Incorrect dollar-quoted string constant syntax: missing closing $
fixed_query:
SELECT
  id,
  amount,
  description
FROM stripe_data.charge
WHERE description = $$Payment for order #123$$
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT
  id,
  amount,
  description
FROM stripe_data.charge
WHERE description = $$Payment for order #123$
LIMIT 10
error_message:
Unterminated dollar quote started at position 199 in SQL -- Metabase:: userID: 1 queryType: native queryHash: 0724383c87a3ff7c9dcf7dae3ebd1dafcaae62c59cf7f8251d01697c3db18408
SELECT
  id,
  amount,
  description
FROM stripe_data.charge
WHERE description = $$Payment for order #123$
LIMIT 10. Expected terminating $$

description: Incorrectly quoting fully-qualified identifier as single string instead of quoting each part
fixed_query:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT
  name,
  annual_revenue AS "annual $$"
FROM salesforce_data.account
) AS "our revenue "
WHERE "our revenue "."annual $$" > 500000
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT
  name,
  annual_revenue AS "annual $$"
FROM salesforce_data.account
) AS "our revenue "
WHERE "our revenue.annual $$" > 500000
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: column "our revenue.annual $$" does not exist
  Position: 237
